x-enumeration-literals.name: Cardholder
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person who owns and uses the debit card to access funds in their bank account for payments or withdrawals.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Issuing Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description: The bank or financial institution that issues the debit card, maintains the linked account, and authorizes transactions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Merchant
x-enumeration-literals.description: The business or organization that accepts debit card payments for goods or services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Merchant Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description: The bank that processes debit card payments on behalf of the merchant and settles funds with the issuing bank.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payment Network
x-enumeration-literals.description: The organization (e.g., Visa, Mastercard) that facilitates communication, authorization, and settlement between the issuing and acquiring banks.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ATM Operator
x-enumeration-literals.description: The bank or third-party entity that provides ATM access for cash withdrawals using the debit card.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description: Government or official bodies that supervise and regulate debit card operations, ensuring compliance with financial, security, and consumer protection laws.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Technology Provider
x-enumeration-literals.description: Companies that supply card management systems, payment processing platforms, and infrastructure for transactions.
